subcodes.first_line: Thy clamor and cry were hearkened unto, and the flame of Thy love was witnessed ablaze in every place where the Friend did dwell [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ضجیج و صریخت اصغا شد و اشتعال نار محبتت ملاحظه گشت در هر محل که بودی دوست با
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment
